name: University Admissions Enquiry Intake
opening_message: Thanks for contacting admissions. I can help capture your question and route it to the right team.

required_fields.label: Email
required_fields.question: What email should admissions use to reply?

required_fields.label: Course
required_fields.question: Which course, subject, or department is this about?

required_fields.label: Study level
required_fields.question: Is this undergraduate, postgraduate, research, international, or another route?
required_fields.why: Different teams may handle each route.

required_fields.label: Application stage
required_fields.question: Have you applied already, or are you still deciding?

follow_up_questions: Are you a UK, international, clearing, transfer, or returning applicant?
Do you have an application ID?
Is the question about entry requirements, fees, visas, accommodation, open days, or scholarships?
Is there a deadline the team should know about?

urgency_rules.match: deadline today, visa deadline, offer deadline, clearing, enrolment issue
urgency_rules.action: Flag as time-sensitive and route to admissions support.

urgency_rules.match: application ID and existing application problem
urgency_rules.action: Collect ID and route to applicant support.
Collect course, study level, and preferred reply method.

sms_templates: Your admissions enquiry has been logged. Please check your email for the team's reply.
If you have an application ID, please reply with it so admissions can find your record faster.
handoff_summary: Application stage and ID if supplied
safety_notes: Do not guarantee admission, fee status, visa outcomes, or scholarship decisions.
Route immigration, safeguarding, or welfare concerns to the university's approved team.
